Food poisoning isn't my idea of an adventure, but the memories can make it worthwhile! Would love to hear about the insane experiences that made it all worth it though!

Oh yeah, like that time my vacation turned into a water park of norovirus, but the beach vistas were unbeatable. Or the Thanksgiving potluck where we inadvertently used each other's leftovers instead of bringing dishes—nobody got food poisoning but the stories remain legendary. Ever been sick but still had a good story to tell?

gah, not me directly, but i've heard of plenty of viral-induced tales like getting food poisoning at a bbq and still finding it laughable later! there are downsides though, like needing hospital emergency access on hand during epic hangovers or dealing with a flu while hiking! does anyone have these kinds of adventures they’d crack up to relate?
